title: CoinFlipExtreme
description: layers can wager currency against each other or the house in exciting coin flip games
body:
## Overview
**CoinFlipEX** brings professional coin flip gambling to your Minecraft server. Players can create games and challenge others or test their luck against the house, all through an easy-to-use graphical interface. With full Vault integration, extensive customization options, and fair gameplay mechanics, this plugin offers complete control over your server's gambling economy.
## Key Features
**Two Game Modes**
- **Player vs Player**: Create games and wait for opponents to join, winner takes the pot
- **AI/House Mode**: Instant games against the server with configurable house edge
**Economy Integration**
- Full Vault API support for all major economy plugins
- Automatic balance validation and bet limits
- Configurable server fees (default 5%)
- Minimum and maximum bet settings
**User Interface**
- Clean GUI for browsing and joining games
- Visual indicators showing affordable games
- Chat-based bet input for precise amounts
- Clear game information display
**Animations**
- Particle effects and sounds for Player vs Player games
- Chat-based countdown for AI games
- 5-second animations with winner announcements
- Fully customizable effects
**Complete Customization**
- Every message customizable with color codes
- Configure fees, bet limits, and house edge
- Enable/disable game modes independently
- Customize GUI items, materials, and lore
- Adjust all animation settings
## Commands & Permissions
**Commands**
- `/cf` or `/cfex` - Open the coin flip GUI
- `/cfadmin reload` - Reload configuration
- `/cfadmin info` - View plugin stats
**Permissions**
- `coinflipex.use` - Access to gambling system (default: true)
- `coinflipex.admin` - Admin commands (default: op)
## How to Play
1. Type `/cf` to open the GUI
2. Click "Create New Game" or join an existing game
3. Enter your bet amount in chat
4. Choose Player vs Player or AI mode
5. Select Heads or Tails
6. Watch the animation and see if you win
Winners receive their earnings automatically with the server fee deducted from the total pot.
## Configuration
Extensive config.yml options including:
- Server fee percentage
- Minimum/maximum bet amounts
- House edge for AI games
- Animation duration and effects
- All messages with color support
- GUI customization (titles, items, materials)
- Game mode toggles
## Installation
1. Install Vault and an economy plugin on your server
2. Download CoinFlipEX JAR file
3. Place in your `plugins` folder
4. Restart server
5. Configure `plugins/CoinFlipEX/config.yml` as needed
6. Reload with `/cfadmin reload`
## Compatibility
**Minecraft Versions**: 1.8 - 1.21.10
**Server Software**: PaperMC, Spigot, Bukkit
**Dependencies**: Vault (required), Economy plugin (required)
